name: Off-The-Wall Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spray a 9 x 11 x 2 inch pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cake mix, egg whites, and water until smooth and well mixed.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
5. In another bowl, mix the soft cream cheese, sugar, and egg until creamy.
6. Stir in the chocolate pieces and chopped walnuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the cream cheese mixture over the cake batter.
8. Bake for 50 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
12 servings. Calories: 272.8, Fat: 8g (Sat Fat: 2.5g, Mono Fat: 2.9g, Poly Fat: 2.2g), Cholesterol: 14mg, Carbohydrates: 45.8g, Fiber: 0.7g, Protein: 5.9g, Sodium: 320mg
